title: Evaluation of Methodological Study Characteristics Extraction with JATSdecoder
author: Ingmar Böschen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.pex-2128/v2

steps.instruction: Download the data and R script.
Unpack the data und open the script in a recent version of R (www.r-project.org).
Install the required packages JATSdecoder, wordcloud and xtable.
Run the script to reproduce the analysis
Evaluation of the extraction of methodological study characteristics with JATSdecoder by Ingmar Böschen published in Scientific Reports on 04 Jan, 2023 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/s41598-022-27085-y
Data.Zip Data to reproduce the analysis Script_evolutioninpsychologicalresearchpractice.R R script to reproduce the analysis
